title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0948
summary: Rajnikant Shukla, a school manager, was accused of taking ₹15 lakh in bribe for appointing the informant as a teacher, but later demanding more and denying her the post. The FIR was filed six years later, allegedly as retaliation for a kidnapping FIR filed by Shukla against her relatives.
